zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianore Widdrington於1343年之後出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德維德林頓時，她的父親Roger de Widdrington8694歲，母親Elizabeth Acton8675歲。她於1379年與Conan de Aske在英國諾圖波藍德結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1426年。

nameMeanings.name: Widdrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative from Widdrington (Northumb), recorded as Vuderintuna, about 1160.

variants.name: Wethington
meanings: English: habitational name, a shortened form of   Wetherington  .

variants.name: Wetherington
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): from Widdrington (Northumberland). The placename derives from an Old English personal name Widuhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Witherington
meanings: English: either a variant of Wetherington , or perhaps a habitational name from Witherenden in Ticehurst (Sussex), Witherden Farm in Headcorn (Kent), or a lost place called Witherington or similar. The Sussex and Kent placenames probably derive from an Old English personal name Wither + Old English connective -ing- + denn ‘woodland pasture’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianore Widdrington was born after 1343, in Widdrington, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Roger de Widdrington, was 8694 and her mother, Elizabeth Acton, was 8675. She married Conan de Aske in 1379, in Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1426.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianore Widdrington est née après 1343, à Widdrington, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Widdrington, avait 8694 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Acton, avait 8675 ans. Elle a épousé Conan de Aske en 1379, à Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1426.

Sie hat 1379 in Northumberland, England Conan de Aske geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1426.

Lei sposato Conan de Aske nel 1379, nel Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1426.

ja.lifeSummary: Alianore Widdringtonが1343年以後にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドウィッドリントンで生まれた時，父Roger de Widdringtonは8694歳，母Elizabeth Actonは8675歳であった。1379年にイギリスノースウンバーランドでConan de Askeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1426年に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianore Widdrington(이)가 1343년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 위드링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger de Widdrington(은)는 8694세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Acton(은)는 8675세였다. 그녀는 1379년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 Conan de Aske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1426년 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianore Widdrington родилась после 1343 г. в местности виддрингтон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Roger de Widdrington было 8694 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Acton, 8675. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Conan de Aske в 1379 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1426 г.
